response.step_by_step_log: Identified two distinct musical performances. The first song is an original track by Suou Patra, while the second is explicitly titled 'Quiet Night C.E.73' on screen. Searched for 'Quiet Night C.E.73 Suou Patra Japanese and English lyrics' and found the song is originally from 'Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny'. Lyrics were extracted from the search results. The first song's title could not be confirmed via search, so it is labeled as 'Unknown Original Song' with lyrics marked as null.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Suou Patra performing two songs, starting with an energetic original track, followed by an interlude, and then the cover song 'Quiet Night C.E.73' from Gundam SEED Destiny.

scenes.description: Suou Patra performs an energetic original song with choreography on a stage with a yellow and pink background.
Suou Patra performs 'Quiet Night C.E.73', standing on a circular platform with pink heart-shaped decorations.
scenes.original_artist: Yuki Kajiura (Lyrics), Toshihiko Sahashi (Composer) / Gundam SEED Destiny
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
静かな この夜に 貴方を待ってるの
あのとき忘れた 微笑みを取りに来て
あれから少しだけ 時間が過ぎて
想い出が優しくなったね
星の降る場所で 貴方が笑っていることを
いつも願ってた
今 遠くても また会えるよね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In this quiet night, I am waiting for you
Come to take the smile that I forgot back then
Since then, just a little time has passed
And memories have become gentle
I was always wishing that you were smiling in the place where stars fall
Even if now you are far away
We can meet again, right?
